# Mecanicadesuelos — Valparaíso

> Geotechnical engineering services in Valparaíso, Chile.

## Services
- [Aislacion Sismica](https://valparaiso.geotecnia1.org/aislacion-sismica/)
- [Anclajes](https://valparaiso.geotecnia1.org/anclajes/)

- [Columnas Grava](https://valparaiso.geotecnia1.org/columnas-grava/)

## Contact
- Website: https://valparaiso.geotecnia1.org/

## About
This site provides geotechnical engineering services in Valparaíso, Chile.
Compliant with local and international standards (ASTM, ISO, country-specific norms).
